free_text: Photoneutrons from  medium  elements  up  to  80  MeV
The targets were made of natural isotopic mixture and
conveniently  thin  in  order  to  have   negligible
No corrections have been  made  to  account  for  the
neutron   multiplicity   and   distribution  of  the
Photoneutron cross   sections   for   several   light
elements versus g-ray energy  and  integrated  cross
sections at the range 0 - 80 MeV were measured.
Data presented are the results of multiplication
SIGMA x 60NZ/A both presented in Table 1.
there are no data for EXFOR, dates, lowercase.
